channel.title: AK on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in AK on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) WSO: Alaska Department of Corrections (AK)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Alaska Department of Corrections.

Model: WSO Signed: July 24, 2020 County: State: AK FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) WSO: Kodiak Police Department (AK)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Kodiak Police Department.

Model: WSO Signed: July 20, 2020 County: State: AK FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Cook Inlet Pretrial, Anch — Anchorage, AK
item.description:

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)
